name: project-memdir
description: Project-local memory injection and extraction helpers for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Register Codex hooks for project memory context injection and extraction.
interface.longDescription: Project Memdir registers SessionStart and UserPromptSubmit hooks that inject reusable project memories into Codex sessions, plus a Stop hook that queues memory extraction asynchronously.
defaultPrompt: Use project memories in this repository.
